deployment_steps: Install backend dependencies using npm install
Install frontend dependencies using npm install
Run backend server with updated code
Run frontend development server or deploy frontend build
Verify environment variables are set correctly, including JWT_SECRET
result.environment: Node.js backend with Express, MongoDB database, React frontend
health_checks: Verify backend API /api/ratings responds with 200 status
Test authentication middleware with valid and invalid tokens
Submit a test rating and verify it is saved and retrieved correctly
rollback_plan: Revert to previous stable commit in version control
Verify system functionality with health checks
